item.title: my Darth Vader cosplay~ (to celebrate Star Wars Day!)
item.description: I tried to think of a cool way to celebrate one of my favorite franchises EVER and I figured the best way to do it was by combining it with something I love just as much: cosplay! :D

item.title: I need the sequel

item.title: Mara Jade for May the 4th
item.description: Built this entire cosplay from scratch, still the most badass I've ever felt in a cosplay :D May the 4th be with you today!

item.title: Space history
item.description: Margaret Hamilton, NASA's lead developer for the Apollo program, stands next to all the code she wrote that took humanity to the Moon in 1969.

item.title: Random tumblr dump that includes a Star Wars one for the trophy
item.description: This is all canon, and new-canon too it wasn't just someone going off and doing their own thing in the 90's back when canon was a wibbly wimy cluster fuck. https://starwars.fandom.com/wiki/TK-421

item.title: I'm my own best friend !

Barf cosplay repost for May the 4th. One of my favorites to wear to cons .
enjoy my may the 4th great value edition
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: Images of Note: poot
item.description:
I had a dream that my mother surreptitiously attached a bar of Lithium to someone's van to track them.
Mood
Now I want robes.
Imagine seeing that. Imagine walking along a path and seeing somecunt punching some stone until a bit falls off.
Yes
Which character(s) do that?
It's because school shootings make elected officials money and thus there's less of a desire to actually stop them.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
The Perils of Penelope Pitstop was a weird fucking show. They had this girl's guardian try to kill someone for their fortune while the fucking Mob tried to thwart the guardian. THE MOB.
Run.
Yeah don't do this
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
Yeah my Dad has some wild lore.
Our house in the middle of our
Basically me.
Go get the Braincell!
I have a panda head I could do that with.
Waah
SOUND ON I IMPLORE YOU
This is what dreams are like.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay also STREEEEAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: 4 May / For May
item.description: Meanwhile in the rest of the world where day of month comes before month, and today is 4 May (or 4th of May), the obvious question is if this is for May or is this for someone else, and we all know the answer.
item.dc:creator: swephisto

item.title: May the fourth be with y'alls
item.description:
Roger Roger
Unmute: it's worth it
This is the May
item.dc:creator: DankFerric

item.title: First dump, mostly stolen with a couple OC and cat tax
item.description:
Ain't it the truth
AI will never understand the importance of philosophy
Seen it?
My life in a bowl of breakfast cereal on Saturday morning
Honto
The Gordian Knot, smoothly cleaved
Ia ia Pepe ftagn, okay?
At last.
No lie detected.
Gen X: whatever
AI will never understand the importance of art.
They sure are.
*whines*
Ask Pepe, okay?
Buy one for Caillou.
"The pen is mightier than the sword, provided the pen is very sharp and the sword is very small." Sir Pterry, paraphrased. This pen is quite sharp.
Barrister's Cap mushroom growing in my yard.
*looks nervously around as walls creak*
Indeed.
"Perseverance" (OC) a volunteer snapdragon that refused to do what was expected of it. One of my favorite photos. Let me know if you want to see more flower pictures.
Does it come with an extended warranty?
This is what happened.
Willis tax Front page edit: Thanks from the bottom of my heart! Y'all wrote "Andy" on the bottom of my foot!
item.dc:creator: AngryBisexualWithAKeyboard
